texto: Paulo noticed the creature’s swift and frantic breathing and the drop of red staining the ground beneath, but above all he saw the bird’s uppermost eye, wide open and fixed on his. That single eye reflected panic and despair on a scale he had never before witnessed. It was both tiny and enormous, and with every passing moment it seemed to expand, encompassing the trees, the landscape, the sky. That look stilled the wind and darkened the day and, at a glance, transformed a moment of ecstasy into a bottomless pit of guilt."From "The Algorithm of Power", Part 3: The Paulo Fontana Story
explicacao: Citação de Pedro Barrento sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Paulo noticed the creature’s swift and frantic breathing and the drop of red staining the ground …” articula reflexao, science-fiction, paulo em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e reflexao-noturna.
